problem: What material surface coating prevents bacterial biofilm formation on implants?
hypothesis: Perovskite crystal structure optimization may resolve What material surface coating prevents bacterial biofilm formation on implants? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 31 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
